case_title: PO WAN FU VS. FRONTIER AIRLINES INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROGER SORENSEN.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE - COURT'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR RECONSIDERATION OF FEE WAIVER APPLICATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. APPLICANT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING IS DENIED. OBJECTION IS NOTED. REHEARING ON PO WAN FU'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS HELD. THE RULING ON THE APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS REMAINS AS IS. NO FUTURE REQUESTS FOR FEE WAIVER SHALL BE GRANTED AT THE FILING COUNTER. ORDER SENT BY THE COURT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DECLARING BOWAN FU (AKA: PO WAN FU, P.W. FU AND PW FU) A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT
TO DISMISS FRIVOLOUS PREFILING ORDER FOR UNSUBSTANTIATED ACCUSATION OF VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND NONSENSICAL FEE WAIVER RECONSIDERATIONS IMMEDIATELY FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-19-2012 IN 206, THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF PO WAN FU A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT WAS HEARD. APPEARANCE BY SELF-REPRESENTED PLAINTIFF AND ATTORNEY KEVIN MACLAUGHLIN FOR DEFENDANT(S) IN VARIOUS CASES WHERE MS. FU IS THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE OF HEARING WAS DENIED. OBJECTION WAS NOTED. MOTION WAS ARGUED AND THE COURT ORDERED MS. FU DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO CCP 391(B)(3). ANY NEW CLAIM FILED BY MS. FU IN THE FUTURE SHALL REQUIRE A PRE-FILING ORDER FROM THE PRESIDING JUDGE'S DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFF STATED SEVERAL VARIATIONS OF HER NAME AS FOLLOWS: P.W. FU, PO WAN FU, BO WAN FU. THE COURT INSTRUCTED PLAINTIFF TO UPDATE THE COURT'S RECORD WITH HER MOST RECENT ADDRESS. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE THE ORDER. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: J.I. ROQUE/D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY FU, PO WAN AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC-LAWYERS INC. SERVICE* SERVED APR-18-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES INC.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR HEARING ON COURT'S MOTION FOR PREFILING ORDER PREVENTING FILING BY VEXATIOUS LITIGANT HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRONTIER AIRLINES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (7 PAGE) SC-100 AND POS-10 BLANK FORMS. PAID BY PLAINTIFF FU, PO WAN
ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER RECONSIDERATION HEARING
